MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Martin Gaehwiler Senior, Trustee of the Gaehwiler 2000 Trust is present. Represented by Lana Anderson.
Attorney Juliana Pisani appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cassandrda Parker is present.
Attorney Frank Martin representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAY-07-2012 remains on calendar.
